subcodes.first_line: O spiritual youth, O one enraptured of the All-Merciful! For a long time past no spiritual breath hath wafted from that region and realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان روحانی ای منجذب رحمانی مدتیست مدیده که نفحه روحی از آن خطه و دیار شما
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @music and singing, @love as fire
